title: Iguana Lib
description: A library core mod for my mods.
body:
![vfv](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b181610075a42bd134745f2ab506dc0475eaadf_0.webp)
#    Iguana Lib 


A library with some useful utils to control player visual, adding special effects, and manage player view. Made mostly for my mods (does not apply to ESR mods). 

 

 

### This is just a lib core for my mods, which is required to work.

 

[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/eRCGdrEM)

 

[Patreon Page](https://www.patreon.com/c/FelinaMods)
